periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 2am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 2am and 4am, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. Southeast wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

Mostly cloudy, with a high near 77. Northwest wind 2 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.
